creator: david.guyot@europecamions-interactive.com
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #6)
root@Bitra /u/src {⌗0/⬓49}[2]♆# uname -aKU
FreeBSD Bitra 11.0-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Mon Oct 24 06:55:27 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64 1100122 1100122root@Bitra /u/src {⌗0/⬓49}[0]♆# freebsd-version
11.0-RELEASE-p7

freebsd-update fetch, followed by freebsd-update install only updated some man pages and /usr/src files, and lsof is still unable to build. I assume I'll have to make my own kernel, but I've no idea how I came in this situation.
